description_long: This is a robust sledgehammer featuring a large, rectangular metal head with slightly rounded edges and a central circular indentation on each striking face. The head is dark gray, showing a matte, slightly rough finish, and appears solid and heavy, suitable for delivering powerful blows. The handle is made of wood, displaying a natural brown color with visible grain and a gentle curve, likely designed for improved grip and shock absorption. The handle is smoothly finished but shows some subtle textural variation, indicating a traditional, hand-crafted look. No visible branding, logos, or decorative elements are present on either the head or handle. The hammer appears well-maintained, with no obvious signs of wear, rust, or damage.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a solid, dark gray metal head and a curved wooden handle, both showing a rugged, utilitarian design. The surfaces are matte and slightly rough, with no visible branding or damage.
description_view_0: Front view showing two identical sledgehammers side by side, highlighting the rectangular metal heads and the full length of the curved wooden handles.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the thickness and depth of the metal head, as well as the curvature of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the opposite faces of the hammer heads and the handles' curvature.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth of the head and the handle's profile, with the circular indentations on the head visible.
attribute_handle_type: curved wooden handle with a smooth, natural finish and visible wood grain, designed for a comfortable grip
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledgehammer head made of solid steel, with flat striking faces and slightly rounded edges, featuring a central circular indentation on each face
